D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

Binocular Rivalry

slide the rivalry rate and watch two clashing eye images take turns suppressing each other

When the two eyes send irreconcilable images, the brain does not blend them. Instead one is suppressed while the other reaches awareness, and dominance trades back and forth.

The two small panels are what each eye receives. Slide the rivalry rate and watch the large panel — your perceived image — flip between them, breaking into a patchwork mosaic at every transition.
